[?2004lPackage llvm-18-dev is not available, but is referred to by another package.
This may mean that the package is missing, has been obsoleted, or
is only available from another source

E: Package 'llvm-18-dev' has no installation candidate
/usr/bin/llvm-tblgen-18
/usr/lib/llvm-18/bin/llvm-tblgen
/workspace/YatCC/llvm/install/bin/llvm-tblgen
/workspace/YatCC/llvm/build/bin/llvm-tblgen
/workspace/YatCC/llvm/build/utils/TableGen/CMakeFiles/llvm-tblgen.dir
/workspace/YatCC/llvm/build/lib/Target/RISCV/RISCVGenRegisterInfo.inc
[?2004h

observation.command: which llvm-tblgen || apt-get install -y llvm-18 llvm-18-dev 2>&1 | tail -5; find / -name "llvm-tblgen*" 2>/dev/null | head -5; find / -name "RISCVGenRegisterInfo.inc" 2>/dev/null | head -5
